title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.190 - Duration of suspension of license — new license, when
text:
302.190.  Duration of suspension of license — new license, when. — The director of revenue shall not suspend a license for a period of more than one year and upon revoking a license shall not in any event grant application for a new license until the expiration of one year after such revocation.
(RSMo 1939 § 8461) 
Duration of suspension under financial responsibility law, 303.110
